title: Soudal Decorators Caulk 300ml - Gap Filler - White Painters Caulk
features: High performace for the home or tradesman
description: A fast drying interior filler, this decorators caulk can be painted over to leave a smooth professional finish. This white decorators caulk is ideal for sealing all interior cracks, gaps and holes. Please note, this product should not be used externally Seals gaps and cracks in: Skirting boards Interior wooden door frames Ceilings and walls Damaged plaster Brick, concrete and plasterboard
